events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: micron gauge read 353 at isolation and climbed to 4857 after 10 minutes — a steady, large rise rather than a plateau, indicating an active leak (likely at a brazed joint/fitting) rather than just moisture outgassing. Result: **fail**, high risk — leak search with nitrogen/electronic detector, repair, re-evacuate, and re-test before charging.
